word: G2712 - κατείδωλος - kateídōlos - kat-i'-do-los - Wholly given to idolatry

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κατείδωλος

- Transliteration: Kateidolos

- Phonetic: kat-i'-do-los

- Definition:

1. full of idols

- Origin: from G2596 (intensive) and G1497

- TDNT entry: 08:19,2

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G2596 (intensive) and G1497; utterly idolatrous: - wholly given to idolatry.
